dc_description: A yellow and gray metal rowboat rests on concrete blocks in a grassy olive grove. The boat has printed lettering and an Italian flag decal on its side. The surrounding area contains mature olive trees with dense gray-green foliage, wild grass, small white and blue flowers, and a dark hedge in the background. A gate or fence is visible toward the rear right, partially obscured by trees. The image has a slightly grainy, cool-toned appearance.
novel_visual_observations: The boat is elevated off the ground rather than floating or stored on a trailer. The ground is dotted with many small wildflowers, and the grove appears untended or naturalized.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
